from my heart

Welcome to my world,
Nada

من قلبي… إليكِ
اضغطي هنا يا ندى

I just want you to know that you are the most beautiful, sweetest, kindest, and purest girl I have ever known in my whole life. You are the best thing that has ever happened to me, and I could never live without you, not even for a single day.

I love you so much, Nada ♥
إيقاف الموسيقى 🔈
